revision.comment: categorization (see also [[WP:CAT#]]) (via [[WP:JWB]])
1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates

Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23524127410|commit triggered pipeline]]
Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Original 15 wards of Tokyo | title = [[:en:Tokyo City|Original 15 wards of Tokyo (1889)]] | state = {{{state|{{{1|autocollapse}}}}}} | listclass = hlist | list1 = * [[:en:Akasaka, Tokyo|Akasaka]] * [[Asakusa]] * [[:en:Azabu|Azabu]] * [[:en:Fukagawa, Tokyo|Fukagawa]] * [[:en:Hongō, Tokyo|Hongō]] * [[:en:Honjo, Tokyo|Honjo]] * [[:en:Kanda, Tokyo|Kanda]] * [[:en:Koishikawa|Koishikawa]] * [[:en:Kōjimachi|Kōjimachi]] * [[:en:Kyōbashi, Tokyo|Kyōbashi]] * [[:en:Nihonbashi|Nihonbashi]] * [[:en:Shiba, Tokyo|Shiba]] * [[:en:Shitaya|Shitaya]] * [[:en:Ushigome|Ushigome]] * [[:en:Yotsuya|Yotsuya]] }}<noinclude>
{{collapsible option |statename=optional}}
[[Category:Japan history navigational boxes]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
